calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITIONER BRETT AARON NIEBERGALL'S PETITION FOR NAME CHANGE

Off Calendar Oct-11-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for Petition for Change of Name of Petitioner Brett Aaron Niebergall.

Dept. 505; Judge: Lydia M. Villarreal; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Jaime; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:18:45 a.m. and concluding at 10:29:44 a.m.(D505)

Randy Sue Pollock, Esq. appearing for Petitioner Brett Aaron Niebergall.
Petitioner Brett Aaron Niebergall was placed under oath.

Counsel for Petitioner provides a brief summary of the Petitioner's request for change of name.

The Court finds that in accordance with California Civil Code of Procedure 1279.5(e); Petitioner's request for change of name is DENIED and the Petitioner is DISMISSED without prejudice. See filed order.

HEARING ON PETITIONERBRETT AARON NIEBERGALL'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-01-2023 Denied
